title: Ontario Backs Frontier Lithiumâ€™s Investment Plan for Thunder Bay Refinery
content: The Ontario government welcomed Frontier Lithium Inc.â€™s plan to invest in a lithium refinery in Thunder Bay, strengthening Ontarioâ€™s critical mineral supply chain. The refinery, part of Frontier Lithiumâ€™s PAK Lithium Project, aims to be Canadaâ€™s first fully integrated lithium development. Ontario, rich in lithium deposits, is positioning itself as a key player in the global EV battery market. The province is working with Frontier Lithium and the federal government to finalize an agreement supporting this strategic investment.
author: Analysts Account
